ec_only.description: Plant bioelectrical conductivity session. Raw ADC readings from analog pin A0. ref_neg (-50) and ref_pos (350) are hardcoded anchor values to lock Serial Plotter Y-axis. bioelectric_avg is a 20-sample rolling average. Sampling rate: ~10 Hz (delay 100ms). Spikes in bioelectric_raw = bioelectrical response events (touch, sound, proximity, breath).

all_sensors.description: Full multi-sensor session. All normalized values use Arduino normalize() 0-100 scale. See schema_notes for unit conversion.

schema_notes.co2_norm: Normalized 0-100. Raw ppm = (val/100)*1600+400. SCD40 updates every 5s.
schema_notes.humidity_scd: Raw %RH from SCD40. SCD40 runs warm so humidity may read slightly low.
schema_notes.temp_sht_norm: Normalized 0-100. Raw °C = (val/100)*40. SHT41 is more accurate than SCD40 temp.
schema_notes.proximity_norm: Normalized 0-100. Raw = (val/100)*255. 255=object touching sensor, 0=nothing detected. APDS9960.
schema_notes.light_norm: Normalized 0-100. Raw ADC counts 0-65535. APDS9960 clear channel.
schema_notes.soil_norm: Normalized 0-100. Raw ~200(dry) to ~2000(saturated). Adafruit Seesaw capacitive.
